title: Welcome back
subtitle: Sign in with the credentials issued to your organization.
tagline: International-standard financial control—from general ledger to inventory—with reporting stakeholders can trust.
features: Multi-level chart of accounts, fiscal periods, and journal vouchers
Bank, cash, and tax configuration aligned with operational finance
Inventory, units of measure, and stock visibility alongside books
Dashboards and financial reports for management and compliance
Role-based access, user rights, activity and security audit trails
English / Urdu interface and multi-currency–ready operations
footer_secure: Secure sign-in · Your data stays in your control
